principle: Homepage hero must answer three questions in under 5 seconds — what is this site, what can I do here, and where do I start
explanation: X.ux|homepage_three_questions: user_lands -> 5_seconds -> must_know: what_site_is + what_to_do + where_to_start; if_any_answer_unclear -> user_leaves; hero_block_required: tagline (what_it_is) + one_sentence_value_prop (why_be_here) + one_obvious_CTA (where_to_start); conveying_big_picture == most_important_homepage_job + most_often_lost_in_stakeholder_negotiations; NO:hero_with_only_decorative_image NO:CTA_without_explanation_of_what_site_does NO:welcome_message_instead_of_value_prop eg: "Beautiful_hero_image_+_Get_Started_button" >> "Tagline+one_sentence_what_+_primary_CTA"

principle: Generate a tagline not a motto — a tagline states specific unique value that only this site can claim, a motto states a generic aspiration anyone could use
explanation: X.ux|tagline_vs_motto: motto == inspiring_principle ("we_bring_good_things_to_life") -> anyone_could_use_it; tagline == specific_value_only_YOU_can_claim; nielsen_test: good_tagline -> no_other_site_in_world_could_use_it; tagline_rules: 6-8_words + conveys_differentiation + states_clear_benefit + no_corporate_speak; generic_taglines: "world-class_solutions" + "empowering_your_business" + "innovation_driven" -> all_fail_nielsen_test; NO:aspirational_mottos_as_taglines NO:vague_adjectives ("best"/"leading"/"powerful") eg: "Empowering_teams_to_do_more" >> "Project_management_built_for_remote_engineering_teams"

principle: Every inner page must identify the site in the header — users land on deep pages from search and social and immediately look for site identity to get their bearings
explanation: X.ux|deep_link_entry: most_users_enter_via_deep_links (search/social/email) NOT homepage; first_action_after_reading_deep_page -> visit_homepage_to_understand_site_context; every_inner_page_must: show_logo + site_name + optionally_tagline_in_header; logo_must_link_to_home; user_behavior: reads_article -> clicks_logo -> checks_homepage -> decides_to_explore; NO:inner_pages_without_clear_site_identity NO:logo_not_linking_to_home NO:header_stripped_of_branding_on_inner_pages eg: "article_page_no_logo_no_nav" >> "article_page_full_header_logo+tagline+nav"
